steps.title: Identify the clause structure needed
steps.content: The blank appears between the transition word However and the noun phrase the most recognition for voice acting. To form a complete independent clause, the blank must provide both a subject pronoun and a verb.

steps.title: Match the subject pronoun to its antecedent
steps.content:
Keith David is the only clear antecedent in the passage, and he is singular. He gets supplies the correct singular subject pronoun matching this antecedent and creates the intended meaning: despite his varied career, David specifically gains the most recognition for voice acting.

The other choices use pronouns (those, both, they all) that either lack clear antecedents or are plural without corresponding plural nouns.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
